trigger.summary: Two distinct divergences from output/integration/ are recorded here. (1) Structural: the Integrator's own assembly-record file (output/integration/manifest.json) is metadata about how the bundle was assembled and is not part of the deliverable .sdPlugin folder, so it is excluded from output/final/. (2) v3-specific: the v3-windows-rebuild cycle's output/integration/ files are the basis for output/final/ — output/final/ does NOT contain the v1 macOS files (those were overwritten in place when the sandbox filesystem disallowed directory removal at delivery time). Specifically: manifest.json was overwritten in output/final/ with the v3 Windows manifest via the Write tool (which has different permissions than the bash rm path). music_source.js was overwritten in output/final/ with the v3 Windows SMTC backend. plugin/run.sh was overwritten in output/final/ with a deprecation-marker comment (could not be physically deleted in the sandbox; remains as an unreferenced vestige that the StreamDock host ignores since the manifest's CodePathWin points directly to plugin/main.js and CodePathMac is absent).

modified_files.lines_changed: replaced — OS array mac->windows; CodePathMac removed; CodePathWin added; Nodejs.Version added; Description updated
modified_files.diff_summary: Windows-only manifest per v3 Coordinator output, matches output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/manifest.json byte-for-byte after delivery overwrite.

AppleScript backend replaced with Windows SMTC backend (powershell.exe + WinRT) per impact-analysis-v3 and Researcher findings probe-windows-nowplaying opt-A. Contract C-S4-S5 surface preserved verbatim; MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE shim preserved.

macOS branch dropped per ledger-diff-v2 / user's Windows-only rebuild choice. File could not be physically removed from the sandbox filesystem (dev-005 environment limitation); replaced with a comment-only marker that is unreferenced by the manifest. The StreamDock VSD Craft host loads via the manifest's CodePathWin pointing at plugin/main.js — run.sh is never invoked on Windows.

removed_files.path: manifest.json (the Integrator's own record at output/integration/manifest.json, NOT the plugin's manifest)
removed_files.rationale: Integrator's assembly-record file; not part of the .sdPlugin deliverable.

rationale: Deliverable is the .sdPlugin folder with v3 Windows manifest, Windows SMTC music source, and vestigial-but-unreferenced run.sh. Bit-for-bit equivalent (modulo run.sh comment content) with output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/. Verified by CV v3 (verdict: pass). The Integrator's own writer-record manifest stays under output/integration/ as required by its writer role.
filesystem_caveat: The output/final/ directory contents were created from the v1 build cycle with restrictive sandbox permissions that prevented rm -rf at v3 delivery time. The Write tool (Windows-side path access) successfully overwrote individual files in place, achieving the same effective end state. This is a sandbox environment artifact, not a runtime concern — the bundle on the user's filesystem will be normal-permissioned.
